/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/quad_test.dir/quad_test.cc.o ../ec/CMakeFiles/ec.dir/p256.cc.o ../algebra/CMakeFiles/algebra.dir/nat.cc.o ../algebra/CMakeFiles/algebra.dir/crt.cc.o ../util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/log.cc.o ../util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/crypto.cc.o -o quad_test  ../testing/libtesting_main.a -lgtest -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbenchmark.so.1.6.1 -lcrypto -lzstd
